qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Douglas Santos (Brazil).
Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt blocked. Brahim Díaz (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.

events.description: 布拉欣·迪亚斯射门被封堵。 阿什拉夫·哈基米参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Azzedine Ounahi.

events.description: 尼尔·艾纳维射门被封堵。 阿泽丁·欧纳济参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.

events.description: 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯射门被封堵。 阿什拉夫·哈基米参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Azzedine Ounahi.

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米射门偏出。 阿泽丁·欧纳济参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Raphinha (Brazil) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Casemiro.

events.description: 拉菲尼亚射门被封堵。 卡塞米罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Brahim Díaz (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss.

events.description: 布拉欣·迪亚斯射门被封堵。 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Gabriel Magalhães (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Casemiro (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 赛巴里射门被封堵。 尼尔·艾纳维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Ismael Saibari (Morocco).

events.description: 伊戈尔·蒂亚戈射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Igor Thiago (Brazil).

events.description: 赛巴里 进球，布拉欣·迪亚斯 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt missed. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss following a fast break.

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米射门偏出。 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Brahim Díaz (Morocco) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt missed. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross following a set piece situation.

qualifiers.espnText: Brahim Díaz (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco).

events.description: 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lucas Paquetá (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Douglas Santos with a cross.

events.description: 卢卡斯·帕奎塔射正。 道格拉斯·桑托斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Yassine Bounou.
Attempt missed. Marquinhos (Brazil) header from the right side of the six yard box misses to the left. Assisted by Raphinha with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 马尔基尼奥斯射门偏出。 拉菲尼亚参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lucas Paquetá (Brazil).
First Half ends, Brazil 1, Morocco 1.

events.description: 法比尼奥 登场，卡塞米罗 离场
达尼洛 登场，罗杰·伊巴内斯 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Brazil 1, Morocco 1.
Attempt missed. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Noussair Mazraoui.
Attempt blocked. Marquinhos (Brazil) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is blocked. Assisted by Raphinha with a cross.

events.description: 马尔基尼奥斯射门被封堵。 拉菲尼亚参与进攻。

events.description: 伊戈尔·蒂亚戈射正。 卢卡斯·帕奎塔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Foul by Gabriel Magalhães (Brazil).

events.description: 加布里埃尔·马加良斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Offside, Morocco. Ismael Saibari is caught offside.
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Raphinha (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Vinícius Júnior.

events.description: 拉菲尼亚射正。 维尼修斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ayoube Amaimouni-Echghouyab (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the bottom right corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil).

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
